name: EvoRL-Franka-Pick
description: Collected via Evo-RL on Franka Emika Panda. Covers pick-and-place across 50+ object categories with varied lighting and table configurations.

name: EvoRL-UR5-Assembly
description: Real-robot assembly dataset collected with UR5e using Evo-RL. Includes precision insertion, screw fastening, and peg-in-hole tasks with force-torque data.

name: EvoRL-Mobile-Navigation
description: Indoor navigation dataset for mobile manipulation platforms. Collected with Evo-RL in real office and lab environments with dynamic obstacles.

name: EvoRL-Dexterous-Hand
description: Dexterous grasping and in-hand manipulation dataset collected via Evo-RL with multi-fingered hand. Includes tactile sensor readings and RGB-D streams.

name: EvoRL-Quadruped-Loco
description: Legged locomotion dataset for quadruped robots trained with Evo-RL across diverse terrains including stairs, slopes, and unstructured outdoor environments.

name: EvoRL-Humanoid-Whole-Body
description: Whole-body control dataset for humanoid robots using Evo-RL. Features loco-manipulation tasks combining locomotion with upper-body manipulation.
